Fixture 8: Budget Alarm (High Iteration Count)
- Scenario: Approaching MAX_ITERATIONS limit, budget constraints
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "./prd.md", 25) with MAX_ITERATIONS=30
- Expected Behavior: Completion instruction mentions iteration budget
- Key Variables:
  - completion_instruction: Includes "Iteration 25 of max 30"
  - COMPLETION_PROMISE: Not set
- Test: Verify iteration count appears in completion instruction
